name: Red Familiar
name_jp: スカーレッド・ファミリア
desc: You can Tribute 1 Fiend monster, then target 1 DARK Dragon Synchro Monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 DARK Dragon Synchro Monster you control and declare a Level from 1 to 8; that monster becomes that Level until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Red Familiar" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 Fiend monster, then target 1 DARK Dragon Synchro Monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 DARK Dragon Synchro Monster you control and declare a Level from 1 to 8; that monster becomes that Level until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Red Familiar" once per turn.
eff: You can Tribute 1 Fiend monster, then target 1 DARK Dragon Synchro Monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 DARK Dragon Synchro Monster you control and declare a Level from 1 to 8; that monster becomes that Level until the end of this turn. You can only use each effect of "Red Familiar" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
